Make API design, dependency, code organisation, and technical roadmap decisions

success_outcomes: Take the Zama SDK from public beta to production-grade release
Enable wallets, custodians, exchanges, and financial infrastructure to integrate confidential token support confidently

red_flags: The role explicitly requires 10+ years and deep wallet/custody plumbing, so generic Web3 or frontend experience will not be enough.
Account abstraction, smart contract wallets, MPC custody, embedded wallet flows, FHE, and Solana are not visible in the source resume unless clarified by the candidate.

Location is listed as Paris, Berlin, London, Lisbon, New York with possible full remote, so Spain-based full-remote eligibility should be confirmed if the application form asks for location constraints.
